title: eulophia andamanensis
intro: Eulophia andamanensis, also known as the Andaman Mera, is a species of orchid native to the Andaman and Nicobar Islands. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat fever, skin infections, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Eulophia andamanensis include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can aid in reducing swelling and fighting off infections. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and it can be used to treat a variety of ailments, including coughs, colds, and skin conditions.
